items.title: Orange haze from Canada wildfires seen in Ontario and northern US
items.dek: There are currently 838 wildfires actively burning across the country, according to the Canadian Interagency Forest Fire Centre.
items.body: There are currently 838 wildfires actively burning across the country, according to the Canadian Interagency Forest Fire Centre.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: A Cold War bunker gets a luxury makeover as 'doomsday' condos
items.dek: A former Canadian government nuclear bomb shelter in rural Nova Scotia may soon be home to the country’s first large-scale luxury survival shelter.
items.body: A former Canadian government nuclear bomb shelter in rural Nova Scotia may soon be home to the country’s first large-scale luxury survival shelter.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: New monkey species with orange lips found 'hiding' in DRC forest
items.dek: Scientists describe "amazing feeling" to look into the face of an animal that so few people knew existed.
items.body: Scientists describe "amazing feeling" to look into the face of an animal that so few people knew existed.
